acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Absolute qd node-note evidence paths were normalized to repo-relative report paths.
The qd report checker rejects absolute, traversal, missing, blank, and non-string non-null node_notes[].evidence values.
HTTP(S) node note evidence remains valid for durable GitHub references.
QD_WORKFLOW documents the evidence contract and scope excludes product runtime or platform validation claims.

realWorldValidation.evidence: This is qd roadmap/report hygiene and does not require product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, latency, Mac hardware, workflow dispatch, or credential-dependent validation.
